title: Waiting on the World to Change
why_this_song: Waiting on the World to Change by John Mayer (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 36 times; first heard in: "So we keep on waiting (waiting)"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "With the world and those who lead it"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Waiting on the world to change"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "So we keep on waiting (waiting)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "We're all misunderstood"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "waiting" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "waiting" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "world" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "world" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Waiting on the world to change

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Waiting on the World to Change" was released in 2006. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Waiting on the World to Change" foi lançada em 2006. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Waiting on the World to Change" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Waiting on the World to Change" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
